case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. ALISTAR INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALISTAR INSURANCE COMPANY $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,620.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
